template: You are a product feedback analyst. Summarize the following customer review in one sentence, identifying overall sentiment. Review: '{{reviewText}}'
Translate the following customer support message to {{targetLanguage}}, maintaining a professional tone. Text: '{{text}}'
Write a 2-sentence product description for {{productName}} that highlights {{emphasis}} and appeals to {{audience}}.
Extract all action items from the meeting notes below. Return a JSON array where each item has: owner, task, and deadline. Meeting notes: '{{meetingNotes}}'
Classify the following support ticket. Return JSON with fields: priority and reason. Ticket: '{{ticketText}}'
Explain what {{concept}} is to {{audience}} in {{sentenceLimit}} sentences or fewer. Use a real-world analogy. Avoid technical jargon.
Analyze the sentiment of the following tweet. Return JSON with: sentiment (Positive/Neutral/Negative) and a one-sentence rationale. Tweet: '{{tweetText}}'
Write a UX microcopy tooltip for a '{{buttonLabel}}' button in {{appContext}}. Explain what it does and stay under {{wordLimit}} words.
Write a UX error message for {{errorContext}} in {{appContext}}. Explain what went wrong, what to do next, and offer a fallback. Keep it under {{wordLimit}} words.
Rewrite the following sentence to be concise and direct. Remove redundancy without losing meaning. Target: under {{wordLimit}} words. Sentence: '{{sentence}}'
Write a push notification for {{campaign}}. Keep it under {{charLimit}} characters with a clear CTA.
Write a {{dialect}} query to get {{queryDescription}}. Return only {{fields}}. Add a comment explaining the query.
